llm_raw.description: A global cryptocurrency exchange platform offering trading, staking, and financial services for digital assets.
llm_raw.notes: Official documentation is located at developers.binance.com; the fetched github.io URL is deprecated or incorrect. Binance provides a very mature, broad public REST and WebSocket API.
